title: Harden residue and domain_packs regression guards
summary: Add explicit tests and validation gates that block reintroduction of root docs, domain_packs, and retired planning-model residue.
scope_items: Add zero-tolerance residue checks for root docs and retired planning-model symbols on active surfaces.
Run two full post-cutover assessment passes and close any new findings.
done_when_items: Validation fails closed if root docs, domain_packs, or retired active terminology reappear.
